title: T-016 — UI: OEE-003 Per-day OEE Summary page + 3 tabs (oee_daily_summary_page, 15-OEE-d)
prompt:
# T-016 — OEE-003 Per-day Summary page UI

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.3, §15.1, §15.5 (tabs), §15.7 + UX prototypes/design/15-OEE-UX.md:528-674 (Summary tab), :1037 (Six Big Losses tab), :1041 (Changeover tab)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx:1-198 (oee_daily_summary_page)

## Goal
Server Component page `/oee/summary` rendering 5 KPI cards row + 3 shadcn Tabs (T1=Summary default, T2=Six Big Losses → T-018 component, T3=Changeover Analysis → T-018 component) + freshness banner + factoryAvg footer row, matching prototype 1:1. Drives OEE-003 — host for OEE-003.T1/T2/T3 per §15.5.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/page.tsx` (RSC) calls T-013 loader with URL params (?date=YYYY-MM-DD default yesterday computed server-side, ?line=, ?tab=summary|losses|changeover, ?sort=col+dir).
2. `SummaryClient` ('use client'): renders 5 KPI Cards, shadcn Tabs (state synced to ?tab=), TanStack Table with server-side sort via searchParam.
3. Three tabs (composite components):
   - T1 Summary table (default): per-line OEE/A/P/Q + best/worst shift + top downtime reason + factoryAvg footer row (computed server-side via SQL window function per translation note).
   - T2 Six Big Losses: import T-018 `<SixBigLossesTab>`.
   - T3 Changeover Analysis: import T-018 `<ChangeoverTab>` (out-of-scope dispatches to OEE-M-006 detail modal which is in T-020).
4. Freshness Alert banner: server reads oee_daily_summary.last_refreshed_at; render warning Alert if `isStale=true` from T-013 loader (> 20 min).
5. Export trigger button → opens OEE-M-002 modal (T-020 modal suite).
6. RTL test snapshot + parity checklist (5 KPI cards + 3 tabs + freshness banner + factoryAvg footer).

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/summary-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/summary-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/summary/_components/__tests__/summary-client.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/dashboard.jsx:1-198 (oee_daily_summary_page), then it has the same 5 KPI cards + 3-tab Tabs + freshness banner + factoryAvg footer layout — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
2. Given URL ?tab=losses, when page renders, then the Six Big Losses tab content (T-018 component) is visible and tab state is synced to URL.
3. Given T-013 loader returns isStale=true, when page renders, then a shadcn Alert banner is shown with the freshness warning and last_refreshed_at timestamp.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then factoryAvg footer row is computed server-side from SQL window function (not client-side reduce) — verified by checking the loader contract — and UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity + tab URL sync + freshness banner + factoryAvg footer.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/summary`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute factoryAvg client-side via Array.reduce — server-side SQL window function per translation note.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip the freshness banner — required by translation note + §11 V-OEE-DATA-4 visibility.
- Do not couple T-018 components inline — import them as separate modules (parallel-safe with T-018).
- Do not use HTML <select> for line filter — shadcn Select.

pipeline_inputs.description: OEE-003 Per-day Summary page + 3 tabs (Summary/Six Big Losses/Changeover) matching oee_daily_summary_page prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist: 5 KPI cards row, 3-tab Tabs synced to URL ?tab=, factoryAvg footer (server SQL), freshness Alert at >20 min, export trigger (OEE-M-002 in T-020), per-line sparkline column (Recharts mini). T2/T3 tab components implemented in T-018; this task only imports.

Additional acceptance detail: factoryAvg footer row computed server-side from SQL window function per translation note (not client-side reduce); UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
